summary: The user sought recommendations for vegan pasta sauces and decided to try a Mushroom Bolognese recipe. They discussed the preparation of cremini mushrooms and the addition of vegan "chick'n" parmesan to enhance the dish's flavor.
facts: The user has been using oat milk frequently in their cooking. The user plans to make Mushroom Bolognese using cremini mushrooms. The user intends to add vegan "chick'n" parmesan towards the end of cooking to enhance the flavor of the Mushroom Bolognese. The user prefers to avoid overpowering the other flavors in the sauce with the vegan parmesan.
